parameters.query:
/* STEP 1 (v6) - Suggester (needs_property_match) volume extraction */

WITH scoped_leads AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT z.lead_id
  FROM public.z_execution_log z
  WHERE z.user_id = {{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.target_user_id }}
    AND z.lead_id IS NOT NULL
),
prospecto_phone_flags AS (
  SELECT p.lead_id, BOOL_OR(men.normalized_phone IS NOT NULL) AS phone_blacklisted
  FROM public.prospectos p
  LEFT JOIN public.metric_excluded_numbers men
    ON men.normalized_phone = regexp_replace(p.prospecto_numero_whatsapp::text, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
   AND men.is_active = true
  WHERE p.lead_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY p.lead_id
),
lead_blacklist AS (
  SELECT sl.lead_id, (ppf.lead_id IS NULL OR COALESCE(ppf.phone_blacklisted, false)) AS is_blacklisted
  FROM scoped_leads sl
  LEFT JOIN prospecto_phone_flags ppf ON ppf.lead_id = sl.lead_id
),
scoped_log AS (
  SELECT z.id, z.created_at, z.execution_id, z.lead_id, z.tool_name, z.merge_output
  FROM public.z_execution_log z
  LEFT JOIN lead_blacklist lb ON lb.lead_id = z.lead_id
  WHERE z.user_id = {{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.target_user_id }}
    AND z.execution_type = 'prod'
    AND z.tool_name = 'needs_property_match'
    AND z.created_at >= '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_start }}'::timestamp
    AND z.created_at < '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_end }}'::timestamp
    AND COALESCE(lb.is_blacklisted, false) = false
),
data_elements AS (
  SELECT sl.*, elem
  FROM scoped_log sl
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(sl.merge_output->'data') AS elem
  WHERE elem ? sl.tool_name
),
property_match_requests AS (
  SELECT
    de.id AS execution_log_id, de.execution_id, de.created_at, de.lead_id,
    req ->> 'request_number' AS request_number,
    req ->> 'request_result' AS request_result,
    (req ->> 'has_exact')::boolean AS has_exact,
    req ->> 'structured_criteria' AS structured_criteria,
    req ->> 'semantic_criteria' AS semantic_criteria,
    req ->> 'response_context' AS response_context
  FROM data_elements de
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(de.elem -> de.tool_name -> 'requests') AS req
)
SELECT
  execution_log_id, execution_id, created_at, lead_id, request_number, request_result, has_exact, structured_criteria,
  (regexp_match(response_context, '(\d+)\s*proyectos'))[1]::int AS proyectos_evaluados,
  (regexp_match(response_context, '(\d+)\s*modelos'))[1]::int AS modelos_evaluados_criterio,
  (regexp_match(response_context, '(\d+)\s*unidades'))[1]::int AS unidades_evaluadas,
  COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regexp_matches(COALESCE(response_context, ''), 'docs: brochure', 'g')), 0)::int AS opciones_presentadas
FROM property_match_requests
ORDER BY created_at DESC;

/* Property Details (needs_property_details) volume extraction */

WITH scoped_leads AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT z.lead_id
  FROM public.z_execution_log z
  WHERE z.user_id = {{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.target_user_id }}
    AND z.lead_id IS NOT NULL
),
prospecto_phone_flags AS (
  SELECT p.lead_id, BOOL_OR(men.normalized_phone IS NOT NULL) AS phone_blacklisted
  FROM public.prospectos p
  LEFT JOIN public.metric_excluded_numbers men
    ON men.normalized_phone = regexp_replace(p.prospecto_numero_whatsapp::text, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
   AND men.is_active = true
  WHERE p.lead_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY p.lead_id
),
lead_blacklist AS (
  SELECT sl.lead_id, (ppf.lead_id IS NULL OR COALESCE(ppf.phone_blacklisted, false)) AS is_blacklisted
  FROM scoped_leads sl
  LEFT JOIN prospecto_phone_flags ppf ON ppf.lead_id = sl.lead_id
),
scoped_log AS (
  SELECT z.id, z.created_at, z.execution_id, z.lead_id, z.tool_name, z.merge_output
  FROM public.z_execution_log z
  LEFT JOIN lead_blacklist lb ON lb.lead_id = z.lead_id
  WHERE z.user_id = {{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.target_user_id }}
    AND z.execution_type = 'prod'
    AND z.tool_name = 'needs_property_details'
    AND z.created_at >= '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_start }}'::timestamp
    AND z.created_at < '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_end }}'::timestamp
    AND COALESCE(lb.is_blacklisted, false) = false
),
data_elements AS (
  SELECT sl.*, elem
  FROM scoped_log sl
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(sl.merge_output->'data') AS elem
  WHERE elem ? sl.tool_name
),
raw_outputs AS (
  SELECT de.id AS execution_log_id, de.execution_id, de.created_at, de.lead_id,
    de.elem -> de.tool_name ->> 'output' AS raw_text
  FROM data_elements de
  WHERE de.elem -> de.tool_name ->> 'output' IS NOT NULL
    AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regexp_matches(de.elem -> de.tool_name ->> 'output', '"response_type"', 'g')) = 1
),
property_details_parsed AS (
  SELECT execution_log_id, execution_id, created_at, lead_id, raw_text::jsonb AS parsed_output
  FROM raw_outputs
)
SELECT
  execution_log_id, execution_id, created_at, lead_id,
  parsed_output ->> 'response_type' AS response_type,
  COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(parsed_output -> 'projects'), 0) AS proyectos_compilados,
  COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(parsed_output -> 'unit_groups'), 0) AS unidades_compiladas,
  COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(parsed_output -> 'standalone_listings'), 0) AS listados_independientes_compilados
FROM property_details_parsed
ORDER BY created_at DESC;

/* Scheduler (needs_scheduling) volume extraction */

WITH scoped_leads AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT z.lead_id
  FROM public.z_execution_log z
  WHERE z.user_id = {{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.target_user_id }}
    AND z.lead_id IS NOT NULL
),
prospecto_phone_flags AS (
  SELECT p.lead_id, BOOL_OR(men.normalized_phone IS NOT NULL) AS phone_blacklisted
  FROM public.prospectos p
  LEFT JOIN public.metric_excluded_numbers men
    ON men.normalized_phone = regexp_replace(p.prospecto_numero_whatsapp::text, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
   AND men.is_active = true
  WHERE p.lead_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY p.lead_id
),
lead_blacklist AS (
  SELECT sl.lead_id, (ppf.lead_id IS NULL OR COALESCE(ppf.phone_blacklisted, false)) AS is_blacklisted
  FROM scoped_leads sl
  LEFT JOIN prospecto_phone_flags ppf ON ppf.lead_id = sl.lead_id
),
scoped_log AS (
  SELECT z.id, z.created_at, z.execution_id, z.lead_id, z.tool_name, z.merge_output
  FROM public.z_execution_log z
  LEFT JOIN lead_blacklist lb ON lb.lead_id = z.lead_id
  WHERE z.user_id = {{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.target_user_id }}
    AND z.execution_type = 'prod'
    AND z.tool_name = 'needs_scheduling'
    AND z.created_at >= '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_start }}'::timestamp
    AND z.created_at < '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_end }}'::timestamp
    AND COALESCE(lb.is_blacklisted, false) = false
),
data_elements AS (
  SELECT sl.*, elem
  FROM scoped_log sl
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(sl.merge_output->'data') AS elem
  WHERE elem ? sl.tool_name
)
SELECT
  de.id AS execution_log_id, de.execution_id, de.created_at, de.lead_id,
  de.elem -> de.tool_name ->> 'modality' AS modality,
  (de.elem -> de.tool_name ->> 'start_at') IS NOT NULL AS tiene_start_at,
  (de.elem -> de.tool_name ->> 'end_at') IS NOT NULL AS tiene_end_at,
  NULLIF(de.elem -> de.tool_name ->> 'event_deleted', '') IS NOT NULL AS evento_eliminado
FROM data_elements de
ORDER BY de.created_at DESC;

WITH prospecto_phone_flags AS (
  SELECT p.lead_id,
    BOOL_OR(men.normalized_phone IS NOT NULL) AS phone_blacklisted,
    BOOL_OR(p.bot_estado = 'Activo') AS is_active_bot
  FROM public.prospectos p
  LEFT JOIN public.metric_excluded_numbers men
    ON men.normalized_phone = regexp_replace(p.prospecto_numero_whatsapp::text, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
   AND men.is_active = true
  WHERE p.lead_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY p.lead_id
),
chat_flags AS (
  SELECT cm.lead_id,
    BOOL_OR(cm.plataforma_origen ILIKE '%CTWA%') AS has_ctwa,
    BOOL_OR(cm.message_class = 'Campaña') AS has_campana,
    BOOL_OR(NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cm.content, '')), '') IS NOT NULL) AS has_convo,
    MIN(COALESCE(cm.mensaje_enviado_el, cm.registro_creado_el)) FILTER (
      WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cm.content, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
        AND LOWER(TRIM(cm.tipo_emisor)) IN ('bot', 'usuario')
        AND cm.message_class = 'Campaña'
    ) AS first_masivo_at,
    MAX(COALESCE(cm.mensaje_enviado_el, cm.registro_creado_el)) FILTER (
      WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cm.content, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
        AND LOWER(TRIM(cm.tipo_emisor)) = 'prospecto'
    ) AS last_prospecto_reply_at
  FROM public.chat_messages cm
  WHERE cm.user_id = {{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.target_user_id }}
    AND cm.lead_id IS NOT NULL
    AND COALESCE(cm.mensaje_enviado_el, cm.registro_creado_el) >= '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_start }}'::timestamp
    AND COALESCE(cm.mensaje_enviado_el, cm.registro_creado_el) < '{{ $('').first().json.period_end }}'::timestamp
  GROUP BY cm.lead_id
),
tool_leads AS (
  SELECT z.lead_id,
    BOOL_OR(z.tool_name = 'needs_property_match') AS used_suggester,
    BOOL_OR(z.tool_name = 'needs_property_details') AS used_details,
    BOOL_OR(z.tool_name = 'needs_scheduling') AS used_scheduler
  FROM public.z_execution_log z
  LEFT JOIN prospecto_phone_flags ppf ON ppf.lead_id = z.lead_id
  WHERE z.user_id = {{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.target_user_id }}
    AND z.execution_type = 'prod'
    AND z.tool_name IN ('needs_property_match', 'needs_property_details', 'needs_scheduling')
    AND z.created_at >= '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_start }}'::timestamp
    AND z.created_at < '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_end }}'::timestamp
    AND COALESCE(ppf.phone_blacklisted, false) = false
    AND z.lead_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY z.lead_id
),
stage_leads AS (
  -- 1. People with Convos
  SELECT 1 AS s, 'People with Convos' AS stage, cf.lead_id
  FROM chat_flags cf
  LEFT JOIN prospecto_phone_flags ppf ON ppf.lead_id = cf.lead_id
  WHERE cf.has_convo AND COALESCE(ppf.phone_blacklisted, false) = false

  UNION ALL

  -- 2. Leads (CTWA/MM/Active)
  SELECT 2, 'Leads (CTWA/MM/Active)', cf.lead_id
  FROM chat_flags cf
  LEFT JOIN prospecto_phone_flags ppf ON ppf.lead_id = cf.lead_id
  WHERE cf.has_convo
    AND (cf.has_ctwa OR cf.has_campana OR COALESCE(ppf.is_active_bot, false))
    AND COALESCE(ppf.phone_blacklisted, false) = false

  UNION ALL

  -- 3. MM
  SELECT 3, 'MM', cf.lead_id
  FROM chat_flags cf
  LEFT JOIN prospecto_phone_flags ppf ON ppf.lead_id = cf.lead_id
  WHERE cf.has_convo AND cf.has_campana
    AND COALESCE(ppf.phone_blacklisted, false) = false

  UNION ALL

  -- 4. MM - Interacted (Replied After)
  SELECT 4, 'MM - Interacted (Replied After)', cf.lead_id
  FROM chat_flags cf
  LEFT JOIN prospecto_phone_flags ppf ON ppf.lead_id = cf.lead_id
  WHERE cf.has_convo AND cf.has_campana
    AND cf.first_masivo_at IS NOT NULL
    AND cf.last_prospecto_reply_at IS NOT NULL
    AND cf.last_prospecto_reply_at > cf.first_masivo_at
    AND COALESCE(ppf.phone_blacklisted, false) = false

  UNION ALL

  -- 5. CTWA only
  SELECT 5, 'CTWA', cf.lead_id
  FROM chat_flags cf
  LEFT JOIN prospecto_phone_flags ppf ON ppf.lead_id = cf.lead_id
  WHERE cf.has_convo AND cf.has_ctwa
    AND COALESCE(ppf.phone_blacklisted, false) = false

  UNION ALL

  -- 6. Active Only (Not CTWA or MM)
  SELECT 6, 'Active Only (Not CTWA or MM)', cf.lead_id
  FROM chat_flags cf
  LEFT JOIN prospecto_phone_flags ppf ON ppf.lead_id = cf.lead_id
  WHERE cf.has_convo
    AND COALESCE(ppf.is_active_bot, false)
    AND NOT cf.has_ctwa AND NOT cf.has_campana
    AND COALESCE(ppf.phone_blacklisted, false) = false
)
SELECT
  sl.s,
  sl.stage,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sl.lead_id) AS total_leads,
  COUNT(DISTINCT tl.lead_id) AS leads_used_any_tool,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sl.lead_id) FILTER (WHERE tl.used_suggester) AS used_suggester,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sl.lead_id) FILTER (WHERE tl.used_details) AS used_details,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sl.lead_id) FILTER (WHERE tl.used_scheduler) AS used_scheduler
FROM stage_leads sl
LEFT JOIN tool_leads tl ON tl.lead_id = sl.lead_id
GROUP BY sl.s, sl.stage
ORDER BY sl.s;

/* Interacted Leads base — the single source of truth for the projection
   denominator across all 3 tools (Suggester / Details / Scheduler).

   Definition (locked):
     - Belongs to CTWA/MM/Active for the period
     - Has >=1 real message from Prospecto (with content)
     - Has >=1 real message from Bot (with content)
     - Not in phone blacklist (metric_excluded_numbers)
     - Has a prospectos row (no orphans)
     - Deduped by lead_id
*/

WITH scoped_msgs AS (
  SELECT
    cm.lead_id,
    LOWER(TRIM(cm.tipo_emisor)) AS sender_type,
    cm.message_class,
    cm.plataforma_origen,
    NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cm.content, '')), '') IS NOT NULL AS has_content
  FROM public.chat_messages cm
  WHERE cm.user_id = {{ $json.target_user_id }}
    AND cm.lead_id IS NOT NULL
    AND COALESCE(cm.mensaje_enviado_el, cm.registro_creado_el) >= '{{ $json.period_start }}'::timestamp
    AND COALESCE(cm.mensaje_enviado_el, cm.registro_creado_el) < '{{ $json.period_end }}'::timestamp
),

lead_flags AS (
  SELECT
    lead_id,
    BOOL_OR(has_content AND sender_type = 'prospecto') AS tiene_msg_prospecto,
    BOOL_OR(has_content AND sender_type = 'bot')       AS tiene_msg_bot,
    BOOL_OR(has_content)                                AS has_convo,
    BOOL_OR(plataforma_origen ILIKE '%CTWA%')           AS has_ctwa,
    BOOL_OR(message_class = 'Campaña')                  AS has_campana
  FROM scoped_msgs
  GROUP BY lead_id
),

prospecto_state AS (
  SELECT
    p.lead_id,
    BOOL_OR(p.bot_estado = 'Activo') AS is_active,
    BOOL_OR(men.normalized_phone IS NOT NULL) AS phone_blacklisted
  FROM public.prospectos p
  LEFT JOIN public.metric_excluded_numbers men
    ON men.normalized_phone = regexp_replace(p.prospecto_numero_whatsapp::text, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
   AND men.is_active = true
  WHERE p.lead_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY p.lead_id
)

SELECT
  lf.lead_id
FROM lead_flags lf
INNER JOIN prospecto_state ps
  ON ps.lead_id = lf.lead_id
WHERE lf.has_convo
  AND (
    lf.has_ctwa
    OR lf.has_campana
    OR COALESCE(ps.is_active, false)
  )
  AND lf.tiene_msg_prospecto
  AND lf.tiene_msg_bot
  AND COALESCE(ps.phone_blacklisted, false) = false;

parameters.content:
## Note
These Call counts are global not scoped only to the Interacted Lead Base, the final code node however does scope for the calculation

parameters.query:
/* Bot Workload Calls — Leads (CTWA/MM/Active) with Bot & Lead Reply */

WITH raw_messages AS (
  SELECT
    cm.id,
    cm.lead_id,
    COALESCE(cm.chat_id, '__lead_' || cm.lead_id::text) AS chat_key,
    LOWER(TRIM(cm.tipo_emisor)) AS sender_type,
    cm.tipo_mensaje,
    cm.message_class,
    cm.plataforma_origen,
    cm.content,
    COALESCE(cm.mensaje_enviado_el, cm.registro_creado_el) AS msg_at,
    NULLIF(
      TRIM(
        REGEXP_REPLACE(
          COALESCE(cm.content, ''),
          '\[[^\]]*\]',
          '',
          'g'
        )
      ),
      ''
    ) AS clean_content
  FROM public.chat_messages cm
  WHERE cm.user_id = {{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.target_user_id }}
    AND cm.lead_id IS NOT NULL
    AND COALESCE(cm.mensaje_enviado_el, cm.registro_creado_el) >= '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_start }}'::timestamp
    AND COALESCE(cm.mensaje_enviado_el, cm.registro_creado_el) < '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_end }}'::timestamp
),

prospecto_state AS (
  SELECT
    p.lead_id,
    BOOL_OR(p.bot_estado = 'Activo') AS is_active,
    BOOL_OR(men.normalized_phone IS NOT NULL) AS phone_blacklisted
  FROM public.prospectos p
  LEFT JOIN public.metric_excluded_numbers men
    ON men.normalized_phone = regexp_replace(p.prospecto_numero_whatsapp::text, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
   AND men.is_active = true
  WHERE p.lead_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY p.lead_id
),

lead_flags AS (
  SELECT
    rm.lead_id,
    BOOL_OR(NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rm.content, '')), '') IS NOT NULL) AS has_convo,
    BOOL_OR(NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rm.content, '')), '') IS NOT NULL AND rm.sender_type = 'bot') AS has_bot,
    BOOL_OR(NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(rm.content, '')), '') IS NOT NULL AND rm.sender_type = 'prospecto') AS has_prospecto,
    BOOL_OR(rm.plataforma_origen ILIKE '%CTWA%') AS has_ctwa,
    BOOL_OR(rm.message_class = 'Campaña') AS has_campana
  FROM raw_messages rm
  GROUP BY rm.lead_id
),

target_leads AS (
  SELECT lf.lead_id
  FROM lead_flags lf
  INNER JOIN prospecto_state ps
    ON ps.lead_id = lf.lead_id
  WHERE lf.has_convo
    AND (
      lf.has_ctwa
      OR lf.has_campana
      OR COALESCE(ps.is_active, false)
    )
    AND lf.has_bot
    AND lf.has_prospecto
    AND COALESCE(ps.phone_blacklisted, false) = false
),

ordered_messages AS (
  SELECT
    rm.*,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY rm.lead_id, rm.chat_key
      ORDER BY rm.msg_at, rm.id
    ) AS message_seq
  FROM raw_messages rm
  INNER JOIN target_leads tl
    ON tl.lead_id = rm.lead_id
),

handler_context AS (
  SELECT
    om.*,
    MAX(om.message_seq) FILTER (
      WHERE om.sender_type IN ('bot', 'usuario')
    ) OVER (
      PARTITION BY om.lead_id, om.chat_key
      ORDER BY om.message_seq
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING
    ) AS previous_handler_seq
  FROM ordered_messages om
),

message_features AS (
  SELECT
    hc.*,
    prev.sender_type AS previous_handler_type,
    COALESCE(CHAR_LENGTH(hc.clean_content), 0) AS clean_characters,
    COALESCE(CHAR_LENGTH(hc.clean_content), 0) > 0 AS is_workload_message,

    (
      hc.sender_type = 'bot'
      AND LOWER(COALESCE(hc.tipo_mensaje, '')) = 'media'
      AND hc.content ~* '\[(brochure|pricelist) sent'
    ) AS is_doc_sent,

    (
      hc.sender_type = 'bot'
      AND LOWER(COALESCE(hc.tipo_mensaje, '')) = 'media'
      AND hc.content ~* '\[brochure sent'
    ) AS is_brochure_sent,

    (
      hc.sender_type = 'bot'
      AND LOWER(COALESCE(hc.tipo_mensaje, '')) = 'media'
      AND hc.content ~* '\[pricelist sent'
    ) AS is_pricelist_sent,

    hc.message_class = 'Campaña' AS is_campana,

    (
      COALESCE(CHAR_LENGTH(hc.clean_content), 0) > 0
      AND hc.sender_type = 'prospecto'
      AND COALESCE(prev.sender_type, 'bot') = 'bot'
    ) AS is_incoming_read_by_bot

  FROM handler_context hc
  LEFT JOIN ordered_messages prev
    ON prev.lead_id = hc.lead_id
   AND prev.chat_key = hc.chat_key
   AND prev.message_seq = hc.previous_handler_seq
)

SELECT
  mf.lead_id,

  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mf.is_workload_message) AS total_messages,
  COALESCE(SUM(mf.clean_characters) FILTER (WHERE mf.is_workload_message), 0) AS total_characters,

  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE mf.is_workload_message
      AND mf.sender_type = 'prospecto'
  ) AS incoming_messages,

  COALESCE(SUM(mf.clean_characters) FILTER (
    WHERE mf.is_workload_message
      AND mf.sender_type = 'prospecto'
  ), 0) AS incoming_characters,

  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mf.is_incoming_read_by_bot) AS incoming_messages_bot_read,
  COALESCE(SUM(mf.clean_characters) FILTER (WHERE mf.is_incoming_read_by_bot), 0) AS incoming_characters_bot_read,

  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE mf.is_workload_message
      AND mf.sender_type IN ('bot', 'usuario')
  ) AS outgoing_messages,

  COALESCE(SUM(mf.clean_characters) FILTER (
    WHERE mf.is_workload_message
      AND mf.sender_type IN ('bot', 'usuario')
  ), 0) AS outgoing_characters,

  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE mf.is_workload_message
      AND mf.sender_type = 'bot'
  ) AS outgoing_messages_bot,

  COALESCE(SUM(mf.clean_characters) FILTER (
    WHERE mf.is_workload_message
      AND mf.sender_type = 'bot'
  ), 0) AS outgoing_characters_bot,

  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE mf.is_workload_message
      AND mf.sender_type = 'usuario'
  ) AS outgoing_messages_user,

  COALESCE(SUM(mf.clean_characters) FILTER (
    WHERE mf.is_workload_message
      AND mf.sender_type = 'usuario'
  ), 0) AS outgoing_characters_user,

  COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE mf.is_workload_message
      AND mf.sender_type = 'bot'
      AND mf.is_campana
  ) AS outgoing_messages_bot_masivos,

  COALESCE(SUM(mf.clean_characters) FILTER (
    WHERE mf.is_workload_message
      AND mf.sender_type = 'bot'
      AND mf.is_campana
  ), 0) AS outgoing_characters_bot_masivos,

  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mf.is_doc_sent) AS docs_sent,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mf.is_brochure_sent) AS brochures_sent,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE mf.is_pricelist_sent) AS pricelists_sent

FROM message_features mf
GROUP BY mf.lead_id
ORDER BY mf.lead_id;

/* Lead Registration Calls ? mismo universo que Interacted Leads Base */
WITH scoped_msgs AS (
  SELECT cm.lead_id, LOWER(TRIM(cm.tipo_emisor)) AS sender_type, cm.message_class, cm.plataforma_origen,
    NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cm.content, '')), '') IS NOT NULL AS has_content
  FROM public.chat_messages cm
  WHERE cm.user_id = {{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.target_user_id }}
    AND cm.lead_id IS NOT NULL
    AND COALESCE(cm.mensaje_enviado_el, cm.registro_creado_el) >= '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_start }}'::timestamp
    AND COALESCE(cm.mensaje_enviado_el, cm.registro_creado_el) < '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_end }}'::timestamp
),
lead_flags AS (
  SELECT lead_id,
    BOOL_OR(has_content AND sender_type = 'prospecto') AS tiene_msg_prospecto,
    BOOL_OR(has_content AND sender_type = 'bot') AS tiene_msg_bot,
    BOOL_OR(has_content) AS has_convo,
    BOOL_OR(plataforma_origen ILIKE '%CTWA%') AS has_ctwa,
    BOOL_OR(message_class = 'Campa?a') AS has_campana
  FROM scoped_msgs GROUP BY lead_id
),
prospecto_state AS (
  SELECT p.lead_id, BOOL_OR(p.bot_estado = 'Activo') AS is_active,
    BOOL_OR(men.normalized_phone IS NOT NULL) AS phone_blacklisted
  FROM public.prospectos p
  LEFT JOIN public.metric_excluded_numbers men
    ON men.normalized_phone = regexp_replace(p.prospecto_numero_whatsapp::text, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
   AND men.is_active = true
  WHERE p.lead_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY p.lead_id
),
target_leads AS (
  SELECT lf.lead_id
  FROM lead_flags lf
  INNER JOIN prospecto_state ps ON ps.lead_id = lf.lead_id
  WHERE lf.has_convo
    AND (lf.has_ctwa OR lf.has_campana OR COALESCE(ps.is_active, false))
    AND lf.tiene_msg_prospecto
    AND lf.tiene_msg_bot
    AND COALESCE(ps.phone_blacklisted, false) = false
)
SELECT tl.lead_id, 1 AS registros_lead
FROM target_leads tl
ORDER BY tl.lead_id;

/* Summary Interaction Calls ? agrupa mensajes en interacciones por inactividad */
WITH scoped_msgs AS (
  SELECT cm.lead_id, LOWER(TRIM(cm.tipo_emisor)) AS sender_type, cm.message_class, cm.plataforma_origen,
    NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cm.content, '')), '') IS NOT NULL AS has_content
  FROM public.chat_messages cm
  WHERE cm.user_id = {{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.target_user_id }}
    AND cm.lead_id IS NOT NULL
    AND COALESCE(cm.mensaje_enviado_el, cm.registro_creado_el) >= '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_start }}'::timestamp
    AND COALESCE(cm.mensaje_enviado_el, cm.registro_creado_el) < '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_end }}'::timestamp
),
lead_flags AS (
  SELECT lead_id,
    BOOL_OR(has_content AND sender_type = 'prospecto') AS tiene_msg_prospecto,
    BOOL_OR(has_content AND sender_type = 'bot') AS tiene_msg_bot,
    BOOL_OR(has_content) AS has_convo,
    BOOL_OR(plataforma_origen ILIKE '%CTWA%') AS has_ctwa,
    BOOL_OR(message_class = 'Campa?a') AS has_campana
  FROM scoped_msgs GROUP BY lead_id
),
prospecto_state AS (
  SELECT p.lead_id, BOOL_OR(p.bot_estado = 'Activo') AS is_active,
    BOOL_OR(men.normalized_phone IS NOT NULL) AS phone_blacklisted
  FROM public.prospectos p
  LEFT JOIN public.metric_excluded_numbers men
    ON men.normalized_phone = regexp_replace(p.prospecto_numero_whatsapp::text, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
   AND men.is_active = true
  WHERE p.lead_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY p.lead_id
),
target_leads AS (
  SELECT lf.lead_id
  FROM lead_flags lf
  INNER JOIN prospecto_state ps ON ps.lead_id = lf.lead_id
  WHERE lf.has_convo
    AND (lf.has_ctwa OR lf.has_campana OR COALESCE(ps.is_active, false))
    AND lf.tiene_msg_prospecto
    AND lf.tiene_msg_bot
    AND COALESCE(ps.phone_blacklisted, false) = false
),
raw_messages AS (
  SELECT cm.id, cm.lead_id, COALESCE(cm.chat_id, '__lead_' || cm.lead_id::text) AS chat_key,
    LOWER(TRIM(cm.tipo_emisor)) AS sender_type,
    COALESCE(cm.mensaje_enviado_el, cm.registro_creado_el) AS msg_at,
    NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cm.content, '')), '') AS clean_content
  FROM public.chat_messages cm
  INNER JOIN target_leads tl ON tl.lead_id = cm.lead_id
  WHERE cm.user_id = {{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.target_user_id }}
    AND cm.lead_id IS NOT NULL
    AND COALESCE(cm.mensaje_enviado_el, cm.registro_creado_el) >= '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_start }}'::timestamp
    AND COALESCE(cm.mensaje_enviado_el, cm.registro_creado_el) < '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_end }}'::timestamp
    AND NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cm.content, '')), '') IS NOT NULL
),
ordered_messages AS (
  SELECT rm.*, LAG(rm.msg_at) OVER (PARTITION BY rm.lead_id, rm.chat_key ORDER BY rm.msg_at, rm.id) AS prev_msg_at
  FROM raw_messages rm
),
marked AS (
  SELECT om.*,
    CASE WHEN om.prev_msg_at IS NULL THEN 1
         WHEN om.msg_at - om.prev_msg_at > ({{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.horas_idle_para_interaccion_resumen }}::numeric * interval '1 hour') THEN 1
         ELSE 0 END AS starts_new_interaction
  FROM ordered_messages om
),
sessionized AS (
  SELECT m.*, SUM(starts_new_interaction) OVER (PARTITION BY m.lead_id, m.chat_key ORDER BY m.msg_at, m.id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS interaction_number
  FROM marked m
),
interactions AS (
  SELECT lead_id, chat_key, interaction_number, MIN(msg_at) AS interaction_start_at, MAX(msg_at) AS interaction_end_at,
    COUNT(*) AS total_messages,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE sender_type = 'prospecto') AS prospecto_messages,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE sender_type IN ('bot', 'usuario')) AS handler_messages
  FROM sessionized
  GROUP BY lead_id, chat_key, interaction_number
)
SELECT * FROM interactions
WHERE prospecto_messages > 0
ORDER BY interaction_start_at DESC;

/* Pipeline Move Calls ? movimientos de etapa inferidos desde uso de herramientas */
WITH scoped_msgs AS (
  SELECT cm.lead_id, LOWER(TRIM(cm.tipo_emisor)) AS sender_type, cm.message_class, cm.plataforma_origen,
    NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(cm.content, '')), '') IS NOT NULL AS has_content
  FROM public.chat_messages cm
  WHERE cm.user_id = {{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.target_user_id }}
    AND cm.lead_id IS NOT NULL
    AND COALESCE(cm.mensaje_enviado_el, cm.registro_creado_el) >= '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_start }}'::timestamp
    AND COALESCE(cm.mensaje_enviado_el, cm.registro_creado_el) < '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_end }}'::timestamp
),
lead_flags AS (
  SELECT lead_id,
    BOOL_OR(has_content AND sender_type = 'prospecto') AS tiene_msg_prospecto,
    BOOL_OR(has_content AND sender_type = 'bot') AS tiene_msg_bot,
    BOOL_OR(has_content) AS has_convo,
    BOOL_OR(plataforma_origen ILIKE '%CTWA%') AS has_ctwa,
    BOOL_OR(message_class = 'Campa?a') AS has_campana
  FROM scoped_msgs GROUP BY lead_id
),
prospecto_state AS (
  SELECT p.lead_id, BOOL_OR(p.bot_estado = 'Activo') AS is_active,
    BOOL_OR(men.normalized_phone IS NOT NULL) AS phone_blacklisted
  FROM public.prospectos p
  LEFT JOIN public.metric_excluded_numbers men
    ON men.normalized_phone = regexp_replace(p.prospecto_numero_whatsapp::text, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
   AND men.is_active = true
  WHERE p.lead_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY p.lead_id
),
target_leads AS (
  SELECT lf.lead_id
  FROM lead_flags lf
  INNER JOIN prospecto_state ps ON ps.lead_id = lf.lead_id
  WHERE lf.has_convo
    AND (lf.has_ctwa OR lf.has_campana OR COALESCE(ps.is_active, false))
    AND lf.tiene_msg_prospecto
    AND lf.tiene_msg_bot
    AND COALESCE(ps.phone_blacklisted, false) = false
),
scoped_log AS (
  SELECT z.id, z.created_at, z.execution_id, z.lead_id, z.tool_name, z.merge_output
  FROM public.z_execution_log z
  INNER JOIN target_leads tl ON tl.lead_id = z.lead_id
  WHERE z.user_id = {{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.target_user_id }}
    AND z.execution_type = 'prod'
    AND z.tool_name IN ('needs_property_match', 'needs_property_details', 'needs_scheduling')
    AND z.created_at >= '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_start }}'::timestamp
    AND z.created_at < '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_end }}'::timestamp
),
requerimiento_moves AS (
  SELECT lead_id, MIN(created_at) AS move_at, 'to_requerimiento' AS move_type
  FROM scoped_log
  WHERE tool_name IN ('needs_property_match', 'needs_property_details')
  GROUP BY lead_id
),
scheduler_elements AS (
  SELECT sl.*, elem
  FROM scoped_log sl
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(sl.merge_output->'data') AS elem
  WHERE sl.tool_name = 'needs_scheduling' AND elem ? sl.tool_name
),
reunion_moves AS (
  SELECT lead_id, MIN(created_at) AS move_at, 'to_reunion_agendada' AS move_type
  FROM scheduler_elements
  WHERE (elem -> tool_name ->> 'start_at') IS NOT NULL
    AND NULLIF(elem -> tool_name ->> 'event_deleted', '') IS NULL
  GROUP BY lead_id
)
SELECT * FROM requerimiento_moves
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM reunion_moves
ORDER BY move_at DESC;

/* Inventory Ops Calls ? creaci?n de inventario + revisi?n quincenal de disponibilidad */
WITH params AS (
  SELECT '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_start }}'::timestamp AS period_start,
         '{{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.period_end }}'::timestamp AS period_end,
         {{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.dias_ciclo_revision_disponibilidad_proyecto }}::numeric AS revision_cycle_days
),
period AS (
  SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (period_end - period_start)) / 86400.0 AS period_days, revision_cycle_days FROM params
),
projects_scope AS (
  SELECT p.id FROM public.projects p
  WHERE p.user_id = {{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.target_user_id }}
),
standalone_listings_scope AS (
  SELECT l.id FROM public.listings l
  WHERE l.user_id = {{ $('Set | All Params').first().json.target_user_id }}
    AND l.record_status = 1
    AND l.listing_project_id IS NULL
),
counts AS (
  SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects_scope)::numeric AS project_count,
         (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM standalone_listings_scope)::numeric AS standalone_listing_count,
         (SELECT period_days FROM period) AS period_days,
         (SELECT revision_cycle_days FROM period) AS revision_cycle_days
)
SELECT 'project_creation' AS inventory_work_type, project_count AS units, project_count, standalone_listing_count, period_days, revision_cycle_days FROM counts
UNION ALL
SELECT 'standalone_listing_creation' AS inventory_work_type, standalone_listing_count AS units, project_count, standalone_listing_count, period_days, revision_cycle_days FROM counts
UNION ALL
SELECT 'project_availability_revision' AS inventory_work_type,
  CASE WHEN revision_cycle_days > 0 THEN project_count * (period_days / revision_cycle_days) ELSE 0 END AS units,
  project_count, standalone_listing_count, period_days, revision_cycle_days
FROM counts;
